pet_notes: Match the provided 月薪喵 reference as a pet-safe original sprite: chubby white bean-shaped cat body, tan floppy head-cap with cat ears and side tufts, thick dark-brown wobbly doodle outline, two vertical blue eyes, tiny simple paws, awkward shy paw-up personality. Keep the same simple hand-drawn meme-sticker feeling. No text, no logos, no extra salary envelope or coin props, no scenery.
style_notes: Simple hand-drawn meme sticker, rounded bean silhouette, intentionally wobbly thick dark-brown outline, flat white and tan fills, minimal details, blue vertical eyes, readable at 192x208.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail.
